title: The Departure of the Penitents from al-Kufah and Their Destruction by the Syrian Army at the Battle of °Ayn al-Wardah
description: Their Destruction by the Syrian Army at the Battle of cAyn al-Wardah483 According to Hishi m-Abu Mikhnaf-Abu Yusuf-cAbdallah b. °Awf al-Abmari:484 When Sulayman b. $urad wanted to set out in the year 65 (684-51, he sent to his leading supporters and they came to him. At the new moon of Rabi°II (November 15, 684) he left with his leading supporters, having arranged with the body of his followers to leave on that night for the camp at al-Nukhaylah.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 20
